subcodes.first_line: O Mir Qabl-i-Muhammad-Taqi! Hearken thou unto My call, for verily it draweth thee unto My Kingdom and bringeth thee nigh unto the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا میر قبل محمد تقی ان استمع ندائی انه یجذبک الی ملکوتی و یقربک الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
